texto: I have tried to bring a diverse message for a diverse audience but no matter how different we are as men and women and as ambassadors of our own culture--one thing is transparent and transcendental and that is our drive to yearn for meaningful and fulfilling success. This innate aspiration has the power to pull us from chaos towards repetitive alignment of what we call Purpose, Intuitive calling and astounding peacefulness. Allow to hear the code of mindfulness at play! TRUST TO CONFRONT AND CONQUER!
explicacao: Citação de Dilshad Dayani sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “I have tried to bring a diverse message for a diverse audience but no matter how different we are…” articula reflexao, diversity, love-quotes em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e love-quotes.
